name: Meta Ads 10-Pillar Framework
source: Industry standard Meta Ads strategy framework — required reading for Ad Strategist agent when paid budget is confirmed
rule_for_agent: When the Ad Strategist plans a campaign, every recommendation must explicitly map to ONE OR MORE of these 10 pillars. The output must reference which pillar(s) it addresses and cite the specific element within that pillar.

pillars.name: Basic Structure
pillars.agent_use: Always start here. Define the funnel stage and objective before any audience or creative decision.

pillars.name: Performance Metrics
pillars.agent_use: Top-of-funnel signal layer. Watch CTR + CPM together — high CPM with low CTR usually means audience-creative mismatch.

pillars.name: Conversion Metrics
pillars.agent_use: Bottom-of-funnel signals. ROAS is the only metric that matters at the end — CPA without LTV context can mislead.

pillars.name: Audience Targeting
pillars.agent_use: Custom + Lookalike are highest-intent. Interest + Behavior are exploratory. Always have at least one Custom Audience layer if pixel data exists.

pillars.name: Tracking
pillars.agent_use: Conversion API is non-negotiable post-iOS14. If brand doesn't have CAPI set up, flag it as a blocker before recommending any campaign.

pillars.name: Optimize
pillars.agent_use: Learning Phase requires ~50 events/week per ad set. If volume is below that, recommend consolidating ad sets first. Frequency >3 = creative fatigue, refresh.

pillars.name: Place
pillars.agent_use: Default to Automatic Placements unless the brand has clear data showing one placement underperforms. Audience Network often eats budget — review data before including.

pillars.name: Budget
pillars.agent_use: CBO for >2 ad sets unless testing. Cost Cap requires conversion volume to work — don't recommend for cold accounts.

pillars.name: Creative Elements
pillars.agent_use: Hook is the only thing that matters in first 1.5 seconds. Test 3+ hooks per ad set. CTA must match funnel stage (no 'Buy Now' on TOFU cold).

pillars.name: Advanced Strategy
pillars.agent_use: Cold:Warm split should typically be 70:30 budget. Scaling = duplicate winning ad sets at higher budget, not raise budget on existing. 7-day click + 1-day view is the safest attribution.

checklist_for_every_campaign_recommendat: Pillar 1: What's the campaign objective + funnel stage?
Pillar 4: Who's the audience? (Custom / Lookalike / Interest / Behavior layered)
Pillar 5: Is CAPI + Pixel + correct events live?
Pillar 8: Daily or Lifetime? CBO yes/no? Bid strategy?
Pillar 9: At least 3 hook variants + 1 CTA matched to funnel stage?
Pillar 6: Will the optimization event hit 50+ events/week at this budget?
Pillar 10: Cold:Warm split? Attribution window? Retargeting plan?
red_flags_agent_must_surface: Pixel not installed → block all recommendations until fixed
CAPI missing on iOS14+ → reduces signal quality 30-40%
Less than 50 weekly events for the optimization event → permanent learning phase
Frequency >3 with no creative refresh → ad fatigue burning budget
No retargeting layer when warm audience exists → leaving money on the table
Cost Cap recommended for an account with <100 conversions/week → won't work
